rationale.R1.2: The agent provides a detailed and comprehensive review of the artifact, identifying several logical inconsistencies and suggesting improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for claims that are not substantiated or require additional evidence, such as the novelty claim and the performance numbers.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers all aspects of the artifact without drifting from the scope, providing a thorough analysis of the text.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent identifies several potential risks and issues, it does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed feedback on each issue identified, suggesting specific sections for further clarification and referencing.
